summary: All four requirements are substantially implemented. REQ-6 (rebrand to Shoe Swapper), REQ-7 (red/black/white theme), and REQ-8 (Negotiation tab and page) are fully addressed. REQ-9 is implemented in Home.tsx referencing the correct asset path, but there is no evidence that the actual image file trading-hero.dim_1200x600.png was added to frontend/public/assets/generated/ — no binary or asset file appears in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: The image trading-hero.dim_1200x600.png must be served as a static asset from frontend/public/assets/generated/trading-hero.dim_1200x600.png
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows Home.tsx references /assets/generated/trading-hero.dim_1200x600.png, but no file was added under frontend/public/assets/generated/ in the diff. The image file itself is absent from the added/modified/removed file list.
